topic: 基于双目多视角影像的场景三维重建

baseline_papers: MonSter++: Unified Stereo Matching, Multi-view Stereo, and Real-time Stereo with Monodepth Priors
parallel_papers: MUSt3R: Multi-view Network for Stereo 3D Reconstruction
DEFOM-Stereo: Depth Foundation Model Based Stereo Matching
Multi-View Stereo with Multi-depth Value Classification and Dynamic Sampling for Dense Scene Perception
module_papers: Multi-View Stereo with Geometric Encoding for Large-Scale Dense Scene Reconstruction
GPU-FRIENDLY MULTI-VIEW STEREO FOR OUTDOOR PLANAR SCENE RECONSTRUCTION
reference_papers: Multi-View Hand Reconstruction with a Point-Embedded Transformer
POEM: Reconstructing Hand in a Point Embedded Multi-view Stereo
Multi-Scale 3D Scene Flow from Binocular Stereo Sequences
Binocular stereo vision based indoor scene perception

evidence_gaps: No dedicated binocular multi-view benchmark dataset (e.g., ETH3D, Tanks-and-Temples, DTU, ScanNet, KITTI stereo) surfaced from raw tool output; manually pull these from their official sites.
No classical binocular-only stereo matching baseline (e.g., SGM, PSMNet, CREStereo, RAFT-Stereo) was returned by arxiv/crossref/openalex queries; need targeted search on stereo-matching keywords.
Structure-from-Motion foundational references (COLMAP, OpenMVG, Hartley & Zisserman) are absent from the raw data; should be added manually as baseline_papers entries.
